In my city where I live there are a lot of types of crimes, that these could be consider as petty crimes. However it doesnt mean that everybody can do such of crimes because if you get caught, you may be fined or punished in prison up to 6 years. There is a pilot project where all the traffic police establishes a point where they stops everybody whos driving a car, then they start by testing all the drivers first, with a few questions, and if they think that theyre in an alcoholic status, finally they do the last step which is the alcohol test. Its a kind of a alcohol test level, everybody blows into this alcohol test level thing, and if you get overpass the minimum levels, you may be put in prison up to 36 hours and plus a fine valued to $400 dollars. Before these actions, many people were allowed to drink lots of times and nothing was happening to them,  due the new law regulations now people stopped doing this illegal activity and no recidivism is applying anymore. Better life for everybody because, it lead to cause less car accidents nowadays.

topic: Talking a friend out of a risky action
text: Good night everyone and welcome to this special party for Alexander and Albert. My name is Joshua: a close friend of this young couple.  Id like to offer a toast for this cute and lovingly couple who had endured a lot of hard times together. Thanks everyone for coming to this special moment. Since I met these two guys, they seemed to be happy at each others side, even if they were just friends. Even so, they seemed to be connected; like they needed each other to survive. Alexander and Albert met outside the city, at that special bridge we know very well. Both of them had experienced a lot of painful moments. Albert was about to commit suicide when Alexander appeared in the middle of the darkness and managed to save the young wolf. Thats how the love for each other grew. Alexander is a smart, nice, gentle and understanding person. He is always there whenever you need help. Albert is an enthusiastic and sometimes crazy wolf that makes others to push themselves to the limit and never give up of your dreams. Albert and Alexander I wish happiness to both of you. Lets toast to these two.

I would define green business as the company that, in order to get economic growth, consider essential the social growth of its employees and users of its products or services, all from the sustainable use of the resources used: water, land, energy, etc... The first and last green company goal has a threefold aspect: creating economic value from social values and environmental. The green business, not only has to achieve the satisfaction of their partners or shareholders through customer satisfaction, selling more, but also it has to earn legitimately the satisfaction of every single part involved in the business activities, starting with its workers, following for its products or services and ending with the "satisfaction" of the environment it occupies, natural resources used and waste generated, care for the environment as his own. Finally, a good green company should try their best to communicate their good work and thereby help generate a sustainable consciousness that affects sustainable consumption. No, I don't go out of my way to buy green products, but I try to help the environment using the 3R's: Reduce, recycle and reuse.

The architecture in Mexico is diverse, major cities has a different architecture, but the most fascinating buildings are in Mexico city. Mexico city is one of the most populate cities around the world, and has a lot of interesting places. One special building is the arts palace, this located in the downtown and is a white stone building composed by 3 dome. Near, around 3 blocks to the south is Latin American tower, in the 90''s was one of the biggest buildings with 44 floors and all outside cover by glass. Now there are a corporate offices with buildings taller than Latin American tower, but this was one of the first and already survived to a major earthquakes, more than 8.5 grades. The last interesting place for me is the government palace, this is located in the downtown, has a really interesting architecture mixing many styles. Some of the areas are housing a collection about Mexico history. The only thing that you have to consider if you want to visit those places is the heavy traffic in the city.

text: Oscar Gonzalez needs and goals in relation to Maslow's hierarchy of needs.  Physiological: Most of my physiological needs are being met. Safety:  I believe that all the people have problems some big and some small problems, in my situation we have economic problems, since bad people stolen a big truck from my family about 9 years ago everything went wrong and wrong, now all my family is renting and that hurts very much. Dear Mayor Bleak, I am writing to you to express my concern about the new superstore that is planning to open in our area. I strongly believe that this will force many small business to close down. I would like to stress that the 95% of our community is against the opening of Super-Mart in our town. It is said that Super-Mart will provide employees to the local community. On the other hand Super-Mart is guilty of substandard labor practices. I want to stress my point of view about substandard labor practices because is know that Super-Mart offers part-time jobs as clerks and stokers and no benefits are provided for these part-time workers. Furthermore pollution will increase as more people will be driving long distance to the Super-Mart. Have you thought about helping economically to our community team, is well know that the small businesses are involved with the local team and for that reason schools are against Super-Mart. All in all, I see no benefit for our community. I would be happy to discuss this issue further Yours Sincerely Oscar Gonzalez.%%

text: Glendora's Residents are living in a Hell Residents from Glendora has been evacuated due to a fire So far, two houses had been burned due and around 2000 residents had been evacuated due to a wild fire around the area. According to the witness, the fire started when three people tossed paper into a campfire while they were camping in the wild area. The three suspects that are on their 20's were arrested on chargers of recklessly starting the fire and living the dangerous scene. unfortunately, not only there are physical damages, but also environmental damages. The environmental protection agency had recommended that residents from Glendora stay in home the most that they can, at least there are an emergency or evacuation is required, this due to an ash rained on the city. Breathing ashes can be detrimental to people's health, specially for children and older adults. Severe school and public places has been closed since the fire started. Residents needs to surveillance their property and report any suspect fire to the police immediately.

If you, someday, come to Guadalajara for vacation, I promise you wont regret it. I can tell you that you would like to stay a few days more. The place is full of old Spanish fashioned houses from the 18th century. Most of them are centered at the downtown, next to the main cathedral. Some of those old fashioned houses had been turned into personal business by people that rent or live there. The most beautiful buildings had become museums or theaters. For example, we have the natural museum located right behind the Guadalajaras cathedral. Its main attraction is a huge mammoth skeleton right after the main entrance. 200 meters from the museum, we have the Degollados main theater: The most important of the city. This place has any sort of events, like operas, orchestras or plays. There are a lot of interesting buildings around there that even I havent seen or went, but Ive heard about them. If you come over here, just let me know and we will look for them.

I have no a deep knowledge about Superstores, however along my life I have realized how some rural Mexican communities have been more adversely impacted by the discount and prices offered by mass merchandisers. In this particularly case I am referring to Wal-Mart.  Nowadays, rural population is being strongly attracted by these new malls because their ease of access, low prices, great variety of products, controlled climate, parking space and their extended shopping hours. As result, sales for business in rural areas are decreasing dramatically while  superstores are operating in specific areas for a long period of time where people regularly attend and consequently cause losses of sales to  smaller competing stores. On the other hand, community is benefited through substantially lower prices, besides other important factor is that most of the superstores are offering credit to their customers. Currently, I think that people spend 80% in superstores and only 20% in local small business, so if the trends continue, local competitors will disappear in a short time.

When I was asked to write about Corporate Social Responsibility, The first thing that gets in to my mind was writing about my own company: I own a small Graphic Design Agency with 12 years of experience working for a couple of transnational enterprises. Our main strength is Packaging Design. A couple of years ago we try to change the route of the company by trying to assume a Social Responsibility with our own employees and with the Graphic Design community. We try to become a company that cares about human resources and understand that is our most valuable asset. We care for their well being and development. And we try to provide them constant training aiming for their personal growth. That was only the beginning , Care about the people inside the company and by now our new target is about improve the conditions for Graphic designers in our country by sharing our vision, giving support and training the new generations of graduated Designers.

A successful person that I admire is my friend Livia. While she was a single mother,she decided to persiut a career in the Administration field. For that she set a very strict own personal schedule. She used to wake up early morning to study before dropping her daughter at her kindergarden and going to her work. Later, she changed her work, for another job that allow her to have more time to study. She got the oportunity to move to the United States, where she kept with the same routing, working, being a other and a student until she graduated. It took her 10 years to graduate but I admire her persistency to reach her goal.

The Torre Mayor is a skyscraper in Mexico City. It's the tallest building in our country with a height of 225 metres to the top floor and 55 storeys. Located at Paseo de la Reforma, it was built by Canadian-owned Reichmann International on the former location of the Cine Chapultepec.Construction work began in 1999 and was finished in late 2003. Due to Mexico City's high propensity to earthquakes, the tower incorporates several anti-earthquake measures. Torre Mayor is one of the strongest buildings on Earth in terms of earthquake resistance, being designed to withstand earthquakes measuring 8.5 on the Richter Scale. Until 2010 it was also the tallest building in Latin America, when it was surpassed by the 236 meter high Ocean Two in Panama City.Since then, multiple new buildings in Panama City have exceeded it in height and the Gran Torre Santiago in Santiago (Chile) has topped out at 300 meters. In 2003 Torre Mayor surpassed by less than one meter the 225 meter (738 ft) high towers of the Parque Central Complex in Caracas (Venezuela). The Torre Mayor was developed by Canadian businessman Paul Reichmann, who also maintains part ownership. It is also part-owned by a group of institutional investors.%% The building was designed by the architectural firms of Zeidler Partnership Architects and Executive Architects Adamson Associates Architects, both of Toronto.

topic: Writing a brochure for a museum
text: The last year United States and Colombia made an agreement in order to reduce tariffs in import and export products. That is what we called "free trade". This agreement caused a big manifestation in Colombia due to the fact, merchants and entrepreneurs will going to lose privileges and their products will no longer be the choice for the buyers. According to the U.S Colombias economy is the third largest in Central and South America. It will create a new market for the entrepreneurs and traders and also is going to expand/promote economic for both. In addition, this kind of negotiations help to show more about our home products, culture and folklore. However, Many people in my country don't agree with it. Personally, I have to say that having the possibility to expand our market to new places is very positive for everyone. For example, people who travel overseas will be able to find goods from their native country. On the other hand, if that is not possible, they shall be obliged to consume food and goods that maybe they don't want to try. Moreover, giving the opportunity to dealers from outside show their products, will open our mind and perspective about the world and what they have to offer us.%%

topic: Hosting a group of foreign buyers
text: It is too difficult to have a clear communication in my country. People has to be very careful when they communicate a message because verbal and non verbal communication has to match to get credibility. For example, if somebody said that something is pretty but said with a strong tone of voice and a rude facial expression the listeners would not heard that something is pretty, they might hear something like, it is pretty, shut up your mouth. Another challenging about communication in my culture is that people are not allowed to talk straight to the elderlies. In my country the youngers are raise to respect their elderlies and do not go against their ideas, even though if the elderly is wrong. In my country, for the elderly, it is important the way that you talk to them. We use a special tittle that shows respect, and if it is not used, the other person can be considered rude or the elderly can hear the message but he would not take the message seriously. I think the most important features about communication is having to match the verbal tone with the non verbal communication, build credibility and being willing to listen more than talk.%%

topic: Writing an article about a superstore
text: Looking Forward 20 Years "People's Lives Predictions" 1. Language barrier to become obsolete: There are some applications that provide translators with words and phrases and according to an article about futuristic gadgets the US Army had proved translators that in real time translate 57 languages. 2. Remote control motorways: Cars will be no longer driven by humans, according to many investigations, cars will be driven and steered by robot control systems in fact in America scientists have a competition with cars driven by satellite cellphones. 3. Glasses and Contact Lenses will be things of the past. Laser eye treatment is already a widely accepted procedure to reduce or eliminate the need for glasses or lenses. This facts bring into a conclusion that Glasses and Contact lenses will be no longer needed and people will be free of eye illnesses. 4. People will be more environmental friendly because of global warming, people around the world are looking for new fuels and ways to eliminate the need of Gas and oil toxic for our environment.

For me being a successful person doesn't necessarily mean to be a well-known person. My mother , for instance, is the most successful person I admire. First of all she is a World War II survivor and that made her a fighter, a resilient and a very positive person. Even though that was a very hard part of her life she considers it like the part which taught her many lesson that she applies in life. Following that, she a very intelligent person who has this learning curiosity that makes her find the answers quickly for any problem that she finds. Finally she is so easy going, so calm, that you always could find peace when you talk to her of any topic. She form a very united and loving family too. For all the above and many reasons more, I admire my mother a lot and love her very much as well.

Mexico city its a huge metropolis where almost 70 percent of electricity is generated from fossil fuel resources which generates a lot of emissions, causing both local and global environmental problems, so I think wind power would be a good option to be adopted in my city because this kind of energy could be really beneficial to all the country because it doesnt cause air, soil or water pollution and its cost and maintenance are relatively low. Due to wind power generation consists in the conversion of wind energy into electricity by using only wind turbines; we can say that wind power is the least expensive of all other forms of renewable energy. The cost of construction of the turbine, installation and transmission facilities would come to only 80,000 dollars, however once they are placed there is only a little cost of maintenance. Another important reason to use wind power is that the generation of it doesn''t produce carbon dioxide emissions, which is important with our concern over climate change.

Green bussiness are companies that produce products that are harmless to the environment, regarless the cost of the products. I think green business is important to conserve our environment; however, it think that most companies far of helping the environment, they do this bussiness to make profit from people who has money or are willing to pay more for green products. I think the solucion to decrease the green products is to educate people about recycling most that the can. I try my best to buy green products, but they are so expensive that sometimes it is impossible for me. The way that I help our environment is using reusable containers, so I do not have to put my food on plastic bags. Also, I eat at home most of the time. This way, i feel that I do not contribute food waste and the use of other products that can be recycled but are not.
